title: cologania obovata
intro: Cologania obovata, also known as the Mexican plum or yellow cologania, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cologania obovata include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease. The herbal preparations of Cologania obovata include tea infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
